title: Microsoft Teams Team
description: Represents a team in Microsoft Teams. A team is a collection of channels and members with shared settings, permissions, and tools for collaboration.

description.description: An optional description for the team

internalId.description: A unique ID for the team that has been used in some internal contexts

classification.description: An optional label describing the sensitivity of the team

specialization.description: Indicates whether the team is intended for a particular use case

visibility.description: The visibility of the group and team

webUrl.description: A hyperlink to the team in the Microsoft Teams client

isArchived.description: Whether this team is in read-only mode

isMembershipLimitedToOwners.description: If set to true, the team is currently in the owner-only team membership state

createdDateTime.description: Timestamp at which the team was created

TeamMemberSettings.description: Settings to configure whether members can perform certain actions in the team

allowCreateUpdateChannels.description: If true, members can add and update channels

allowCreatePrivateChannels.description: If true, members can create private channels

allowDeleteChannels.description: If true, members can delete channels

allowAddRemoveApps.description: If true, members can add and remove apps

allowCreateUpdateRemoveTabs.description: If true, members can create, update, and remove tabs

allowCreateUpdateRemoveConnectors.description: If true, members can create, update, and remove connectors

TeamGuestSettings.description: Settings to configure whether guests can perform certain actions in the team

allowCreateUpdateChannels.description: If true, guests can create and update channels

allowDeleteChannels.description: If true, guests can delete channels

TeamMessagingSettings.description: Settings to configure messaging and mentions in the team

allowUserEditMessages.description: If true, users can edit their messages

allowUserDeleteMessages.description: If true, users can delete their messages

allowOwnerDeleteMessages.description: If true, owners can delete any message

TeamFunSettings.description: Settings to configure use of Giphy, memes, and stickers in the team

allowStickersAndMemes.description: If true, enables stickers and memes

TeamDiscoverySettings.description: Settings to configure team discoverability by others

showInTeamsSearchAndSuggestions.description: If true, team is visible in search and suggestions
